The objective of this study was to examine the current understanding of Alzheimer's disease, including its causes, pathological mechanisms, clinical manifestations, diagnostic approach"

- Definition/nature: "a progressive neurodegenerative disorder and the leading cause of dementia among older adults worldwide."
